race.name: L'Étape Bulgaria by Tour de France
race.display_name: L'Étape Bulgaria by Tour de France - Peshtera
race.tagline: Experience the Tour de France atmosphere on fully closed roads in the Rhodope Mountains

climate.description: Warm summer conditions typical of Bulgarian Rhodope Mountains in early July; expect temperatures 20-30°C with potential afternoon showers. Specific forecasts unavailable.

terrain.surface: Fully closed paved roads through Rhodope Mountains featuring sustained climbs, technical descents, and scenic reservoir views.
features: Fully closed paved roads through Rhodope Mountains featuring sustained climbs, technical descents, and scenic reservoir views

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 79. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 76.

course_description.character: Start Peshtera city center → climb through town → **SUFFERING ZONE 1: Sustained ascent to Sveti Konstantin resort (1,350m highest point)** → scenic descent past Batak Dam → through Batak town → **FINAL SUFFERING ZONE: City center finish circuits**. Fully closed roads showcase Rhodope beauty[1].

logistics.transport: Start/finish in Peshtera city center. Fully closed roads. Race Village provides Tour de France atmosphere. International travelers should fly into Sofia (2.5hr drive). Early registration recommended[1].

history.origin_story: Launched January 10, 2023 as inaugural edition. 2026 marks 4th edition (2023-2026). Part of global L'Étape Series across 20+ countries[1][4].

final_verdict.one_liner: T2 - Premium Tour de France franchise sportive delivering authentic Gran Fondo experience in spectacular Rhodope Mountains. Excellent for climbers seeking closed-road adventure.
